channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 Trump to Raise EU Auto Tariffs to 25%
item.description: President Trump announced he will increase tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union to 25% next week, accusing the bloc of not complying with its trade deal with Washington.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Announces Army Reform as Peace Talks Stall
item.description: Ukraine unveiled plans to reform its army this summer to address infantry shortages and discharge long-serving soldiers, four years into the war with Russia as diplomatic efforts have stalled.

item.title: 🇮🇷💰 Iranian Crypto Exchange Used by IRGC to Move Millions
item.description: A Reuters investigation reveals that one of Iran's most powerful families founded Nobitex, the country's largest crypto exchange, which has become a central node for moving funds beyond US sanctions—even during the current war.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺❄️ Transatlantic Frost Deepens as Trump Attacks European Leaders
item.description: The past weeks have not been reassuring for those who thought Europe could navigate its tricky relationship with Trump, with the president threatening troop withdrawals and tariff hikes while criticizing European inaction on Iran.

item.title: 🛢️⚠️ Investors Running Out of Time to Brace for Oil Shock
item.description: With markets focused on AI and hoping for a short-lived Iran war, investors have yet to prepare for a potential doubling of physical oil prices. The window to do so may soon be closing.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Sanctions Iranian Shadow Banking Networks Moving Oil Proceeds from China
item.description: US Treasury targets Iranian shadow banking networks facilitating oil proceeds from China.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Refiner Buys Russian Oil as Middle East Alternative
item.description: Japanese refiners turn to Russian oil as Middle East supplies face disruption from Hormuz standoff.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon Death Toll Surpasses 2,600 Since March 2 Israeli Offensive
item.description: Lebanon's death toll from Israeli military operations since March 2 exceeds 2,600, according to Anadolu Agency.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Firm Unveils Mid-Range Drone to Exhaust Russian Air Defenses
item.description: Ukraine develops new mid-range drone designed to overwhelm Russian air defense systems cost-effectively.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Rally Stalls as Iran Proposal Triggers Profit-Taking
item.description: Oil prices pull back as Iran's peace proposal offers hope for ending the conflict and reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran submits new peace proposal to US via Pakistani mediators
item.description: Iran has submitted a new proposal for peace talks with the US via Pakistani mediators, potentially breaking the deadlock in efforts to end the conflict.

item.title: 🚢 US Navy taps AI firm to counter Iranian mines in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US Navy has contracted an AI firm to develop countermeasures against Iranian naval mines threatening shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: ⚛️ France24: Iran supreme leader vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities
item.description: Iran's supreme leader defiantly vowed to protect the Islamic Republic's nuclear and missile capabilities amid ongoing conflict with the US.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇺🇦 Japan Eases Weapons Export Rules, Opening Path for Ukraine Arms Supplies
item.description: Japan's relaxation of weapons export rules opens a path for potential military equipment supplies to Ukraine, Kyiv's ambassador to Japan said.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺⚔️ Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Tuapse Port, Creating Environmental Disaster
item.description: A Ukrainian drone attack on the Tuapse port refinery has created an environmental disaster with toxic consequences for the Russian city.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇸🇦🇮🇱 Lebanon's Internal Divisions Complicate Saudi Mediation With Israel
item.description: Lebanon's internal political divisions have complicated Saudi mediation efforts for ceasefire talks with Israel.

item.title: ⚖️🛢️ Commodity Trader Mercuria Sues Baltic Exchange Over Hormuz Shipping Data
item.description: Commodity trader Mercuria has filed a lawsuit against the Baltic Exchange over shipping data related to Hormuz freight losses.

item.title: ⛽💰🇺🇸 California Gasoline Hits $6 Per Gallon Amid Iran Crisis
item.description: California residents now pay $6 per gallon for gasoline as the Iran crisis drives up fuel prices nationwide.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan commissions first Chinese attack submarine in historic milestone for navy
item.description: Pakistan has commissioned its first Chinese-made attack submarine, marking a historic milestone for its naval capabilities.

item.title: 🇧🇭 Bahrain king orders more citizenship revocations over support for Iran attacks
item.description: Bahrain's king has ordered additional citizenship revocations for individuals who supported Iranian attacks against the country.

item.title: 🛢️ Gulf countries' plans to bypass Hormuz still far off, experts warn
item.description: Experts warn that Gulf countries' plans to bypass the Strait of Hormuz remain far from implementation despite ongoing tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Army tests new drones and 3D printers at Balikatan drill in Philippines
item.description: The US Army is testing new drones and 3D printing technology during the Balikatan military exercises in the Philippines.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Launches 400+ Drones in Daytime Attack on Ukraine
item.description: Russia launched more than 400 drones at Ukraine in a daytime attack, injuring 10 people in the western city of Ternopil.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Says "Probably" on Pulling US Troops from Italy and Spain
item.description: President Trump said "probably" when asked whether he would consider pulling US troops out of Italy and Spain, a day after announcing a review of forces in Germany.

item.title: ⛽ Iran War Live: Tehran Offers New US Proposal as Costs Mount
item.description: Iran has offered a new proposal for talks with the US to end the war, as the Strait of Hormuz standoff sends costs soaring around the world.
